scripts.start: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12288 NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=1 NG_BUILD_PARALLEL_TS=0 node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js serve
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12288 NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=1 NG_BUILD_PARALLEL_TS=0 node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js build
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12288 NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=1 NG_BUILD_PARALLEL_TS=0 node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js build --configuration=development
scripts.watch: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12288 NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=1 NG_BUILD_PARALLEL_TS=0 node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js build --watch --configuration development
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12288 NG_BUILD_MAX_WORKERS=1 NG_BUILD_PARALLEL_TS=0 node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js test
